query: Enhance my local text-only 7B model so it can directly consume 3D CAD drawings and explain form factors.
expected_behavior: Recognize that the requested capability requires image/visual reasoning and note the architecture mismatch with the text-only base.
Consider routing to system composition, a specialized vision-enabled replacement, or runtime augmentation instead of immediately recommending SFT.
Collect evidence about the deployment stack and clearly explain why the current model cannot be tuned to satisfy the drawing-focused requirement.
